nav.subtitle: Official / Portfolio Intelligence
landing.hero.subtitle: Portfolio Intelligence Platform
landing.hero.title: Optimize Your Portfolio
landing.hero.description: 17 Labs uses Modern Portfolio Theory and scipy-based constrained optimization to find your ideal asset allocation — then tracks your real performance in real-time.
landing.stats.engine.label: Optimization Engine
landing.stats.assets.label: Asset Classes
landing.stats.markets.label: Markets
landing.features.subtitle: Core Features
landing.features.title: Everything You Need to Invest Smarter
landing.features.optimizer.title: Strategy Optimizer
landing.features.optimizer.desc: Find the optimal asset allocation using Markowitz Mean-Variance optimization. Scipy SLSQP solver finds the true maximum Sharpe portfolio with customizable weight constraints.
landing.features.tracker.title: Reality Tracker
landing.features.tracker.desc: Track your real holdings, live market prices, P&L, and risk metrics. Compare your actual portfolio against the recommended strategy at a glance.
landing.features.frontier.title: Efficient Frontier
landing.features.frontier.desc: Visualize thousands of possible portfolios on the Efficient Frontier scatter plot. See exactly where your optimal portfolio sits on the risk/return map.
landing.features.multiMarket.title: Multi-Market Support
landing.features.multiMarket.desc: Support for US stocks, Vietnamese stocks (.VN), French stocks (.PA), crypto pairs, and ETFs — all in one unified dashboard.
landing.features.risk.title: Risk Profiles
landing.features.risk.desc: Choose Conservative, Balanced, or Aggressive profiles. Set target returns with tolerance bands. The optimizer respects your risk appetite.
landing.features.ledger.title: Transaction Ledger
landing.features.ledger.desc: Full transaction ledger with BUY, SELL, CASH_IN, CASH_OUT, DIVIDEND, and TRANSFER support. Accurate cost basis and performance tracking.
landing.howItWorks.subtitle: How It Works
landing.howItWorks.title: Three Steps to a Smarter Portfolio
landing.howItWorks.step1.title: Choose Your Assets
landing.howItWorks.step1.desc: Add your stocks, crypto, and ETFs to the asset universe. Or sync directly from your existing holdings in the Reality tab.
landing.howItWorks.step2.title: Run the Optimizer
landing.howItWorks.step2.desc: Select your risk profile, set your target return, and hit 'Find My Optimal Mix'. The scipy optimizer + Monte Carlo simulation does the rest.
landing.howItWorks.step3.title: Track & Rebalance
landing.howItWorks.step3.desc: Log your actual trades in the Reality tab. Compare your live portfolio against the recommended allocation and rebalance when needed.
landing.tech.subtitle: Under the Hood
landing.tech.title: Built with Serious Tech
landing.tech.description: Powered by Modern Portfolio Theory (Markowitz, 1952). The optimizer uses scipy's SLSQP solver for precise constrained optimization, backed by Monte Carlo simulation for frontier visualization.
landing.cta.title: Ready to Optimize Your Portfolio?
landing.cta.description: Start building a smarter investment strategy in minutes. No sign-up required.
landing.footer.description: Portfolio Intelligence Platform. Built for investors who want data-driven decisions.
landing.footer.disclaimerText: 17 Labs is an educational and analytical tool. It does not constitute financial advice, nor is it a recommendation to buy or sell any securities. Past performance does not guarantee future results. All investment decisions involve risk. Always consult a licensed financial advisor before making investment decisions.

strategy.stale.title: Portfolio has changed
strategy.stale.description: Your Reality portfolio has been updated since the last time you ran the optimizer. Please re-run the Strategy Optimizer to get accurate target weights.

reality.capitalNote: Based on cost price × current amount. Cash ledger: {cash}

reality.distribution.subtitle: Current Profit / Loss Estimate
reality.distribution.note: Estimate uses current Reality PnL, invested capital, and portfolio volatility.
reality.distribution.empty: Add invested capital and enough price history to estimate profit and loss probabilities.

strategy.toast.holdingsLoaded: Current holdings synced into the Strategy asset universe.
